problem id: 0f7ddd75
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) OR SHL(1)

examples:
  01110101 -> 11111111
  10111001 -> 11110110
  10110110 -> 11111110
  01100100 -> 11011001
  00100111 -> 11011110
  00001100 -> 00111000
  11011111 -> 11111111
  01001100 -> 10111001
  00101011 -> 11111110
  01010010 -> 11101101

query: 00111001
predicted answer: 11110110
